title: [BUG] VueE3 and Vite
author: OlegFromOmsk
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- Building with error -->
"vue": "^3.2.33",
"exceljs": "^4.3.0",

node: 'v18.2.0', npm: '8.9.0', vite v2.9.9

## Steps To Reproduce
try to build project with 
vite build

But where is an error^

vite v2.9.9 building for production...
✓ 50 modules transformed.
[commonjs] Unexpected token (11:63288) in C:/VueProjects/hpv-vue3/node_modules/exceljs/dist/exceljs.min.js

comments.author: bogdan-calapod
comments.body: Seeing the same here with ViteJS 4.0.4 - any hints on how to fix that ?

comments.author: ConradSollitt
bernard-uerm
comments.body: Hi any other workaround on this? I'm currently using it on my Vue Project, Thank you so much for the help.

comments.author: BerenLuth
comments.body:
Same problem here, I'm using
```
"react": "^18.2.0"
"vite": "^3.2.3"
"exceljs": "^4.3.0"
``` 
it works locally, but then when I try to build for deploy i get the same error.

Here is the error i get on build
